system.description: Flashlights provide flameless, low heat light in an instant. The light from a flashlight is directional, casting a cone of light in the direction your character is holding the flashlight, so are better for illuminating subjects rather than spaces. They provide bright light in a wide cone, which dims after several yards. They require 2 D-cell and will work for 1 Quarter from a full charge. Flashlights deal 3/2W when used as an improvised weapon due to their weight and size.
